turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE ROBERTS
turns.text: Justice Gorsuch has the opinion of the Court this morning in case 17-419, Dawson v. Steager.

turns.name: JUSTICE GORSUCH
turns.text: If you served as a state law enforcement officer in West Virginia you are probably eligible for a generous tax exemption after you retire, but if you served in federal law enforcement in the same state, West Virginia will not  give you the same exemption. May West Virginia discriminate against resident federal retirees in this way? Because cases like this have caused some confusion in the lower courts we agreed to hear this one and for reasons explained in our opinion filed with the clerk today, we hold 4 U.S.C. Section 111 prohibits this kind of discrimination. We reverse the judgment of the West Virginia Supreme Court of Appeals and remand the case for further proceedings. The opinion of the Court is unanimous.
